body: ``` /codex https://github.com/ideav/crm/issues/2117 ``` ``` ⏳ Solve command executing... 📊 Session: 6a0ec9c3-04b5-4c22-acc2-8f21e934036e 🔒 Isolation: screen Requested by: @Methistoclus URL: https://github.com/ideav/crm/issues/2117 🛠 Options: --tool codex 🔒 Locked options: --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats --auto-attach-solution-summary --isolation screen ``` Pull request: https://github.com/ideav/crm/pull/2118 ``` box@d9a8eaddc58b:~$ screen -r 6a0ec9c3-04b5-4c22-acc2-8f21e934036e There is no screen to be resumed matching 6a0ec9c3-04b5-4c22-acc2-8f21e934036e. box@d9a8eaddc58b:~$ $ --status 6a0ec9c3-04b5-4c22-acc2-8f21e934036e e44d4086-0b1b-47f2-8733-3abe937e43c5 uuid e44d4086-0b1b-47f2-8733-3abe937e43c5 status executed exitCode 0 command "solve https://github.com/ideav/crm/issues/2117 --tool codex --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats --auto-attach-solution-summary" logPath /tmp/start-command/logs/isolation/screen/e44d4086-0b1b-47f2-8733-3abe937e43c5.log startTime "2026-04-25T09:19:53.475Z" endTime "2026-04-25T09:26:08.736Z" workingDirectory /home/box shell /bin/sh platform linux options isolated screen isolationMode detached sessionName 6a0ec9c3-04b5-4c22-acc2-8f21e934036e user false keepAlive false useCommandStream false box@d9a8eaddc58b:~$ ``` We absolutely must poll all `--isolation screen` tasks, using `$ --status`, so as soon as they are finished, we update the message accordingly, so our users will see actual status of execution. We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions). If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration. If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code.
title: /codex command message stuck at `⏳ Solve command executing...`, with no message update
